Reservation Guide | Tokaido Sanyo Kyushu Shinkansen Internet Reservation Service

2. Reservation Guide

# Reservation Guide
Booking a seat for the Shinkansen will be easy and quick.
Here we will explain the easy-to-use methods for our online service.
## Make Reservation for the Shinkansen
[How to Regiter](https://smart-ex.jp/en/beginner/entry/sp/)
[About Tokaido Sanyo Kyushu Shinkansen](https://smart-ex.jp/en/reservation/equipment/)
[Make Reservations](https://smart-ex.jp/en/reservation/reserve_smart/sp/)
###
Useful Features
[Reception Times/Time-Periods](https://smart-ex.jp/en/reservation/useful/accept_time/)
[Points to Note](https://smart-ex.jp/en/reservation/reserve_smart/attention/)
[Taking Baggage Onboard](https://smart-ex.jp/en/entraining/oversized-baggage/)
[Purchase History/Receipt](https://smart-ex.jp/en/reservation/reserve_smart/purchase_history/)
##
Confirm, change and refund reservations
[Confirm Reservations](https://smart-ex.jp/en/reservation/guide/referral/)
[Change Reservations](https://smart-ex.jp/en/reservation/change/)
[Refund Reservations](https://smart-ex.jp/en/reservation/guide/cancel/)
[How to change](https://smart-ex.jp/en/reservation/guide/cancel/howto_change/)
[How to refund](https://smart-ex.jp/en/reservation/guide/cancel/howto_change/)

Change Membership Info. & Other Conditions
